messages.content: Right on time, Sir. How can I help you this evening?
Nothing much. Can you tell me what's on my schedule right now?
Nothing much. Can you tell me what's on my schedule right now?

It's April 28, 2026, and it appears to be a federal holiday, so banks are likely closed. I didn't find any specific events on your personal schedule, but you may want to check with My Pest Pros to schedule a pest control treatment if you need one.
No, Jarvis, I do not need any.
No, Jarvis, I do not need any.
I'll make sure to keep that in mind, Sir. If you'd like to review your actual schedule, I can try to pull that up for you.
No need for that Jarvis, just open WhatsApp.
Face verification is required before I can run that command.
Jarvis, open WhatsApp and call Suwanee.
